学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science main ranking has been stable in the 69–78 range in recent years, approximately 74th in 2026, placing it in the middle tier of the national top 100; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is generally positive, with the men's volleyball championship increasing the school's exposure; Douyin popularity ranking is 43rd (relatively hot), with moderate to high attention on short video platforms; in 2023, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line but with low attention, and no significant negative public opinion in recent years; Food Science and Engineering is an A+ discipline (fifth round evaluation), ranking at the top nationally; medical majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have strong strengths, attracting Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, while Clinical Medicine and Stomatology maintain stable and relatively high popularity; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Hubei Provincial College Entrance Examination is approximately 393,700, slightly increased from 2025 (Physics Category 249,800 + History Category 141,400 ≈ 391,200), leading to generally tighter competition; Nanchang University is located in Jiangxi Province, adjacent to Hubei Province, with high acceptance for cross-province applications; the school's enrollment proportion in Hubei Province is about 2.5%–3%, representing a medium-scale provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the historical declining trend in rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan, a slight increase in the total number of candidates in Hubei Province, a generally positive school reputation, and sustained popularity of engineering and medical majors, competition is expected to intensify slightly from the 2025 baseline of 23168; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 23436, with a range of 22936–23936.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Nanchang University's medical programs in Hubei Province from 2021 to 2025 were 19317, 5495, 4731, 6995, and 6337 respectively, showing a fluctuating but slightly rising trend. From 2022 to 2025, rankings fluctuated within the range of 4731-6995, with 2025 being 6337. In terms of enrollment plans, there were 52 students in 2021, 50 in 2022, 47 in 2023, 48 in 2024, and 48 in 2025, showing a slight overall reduction. The total plan for medical programs in 2026 is 43 students, a decrease of 5 from 2025, a reduction of about 10.4%, and the reduction in enrollment slots will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a key construction university under Project 211 and a national Double First-Class construction university, with comprehensive strength ranking among the top in the country. Its medical department has a long history, and majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology have a high reputation in the Central China region, exerting a strong attraction for Hubei Province candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has continued to rise, with core majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology being particularly competitive. Nanchang University is located in Nanchang, the capital of Jiangxi Province, with a moderate geographical location and convenient transportation, making it a high-quality out-of-province choice for Hubei Province candidates. The enrollment scale for medical programs in this province is limited, with only 43 slots in 2026, highlighting a prominent supply-demand contradiction.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the above factors, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Nanchang University's medical programs in Hubei Province in 2026 will be approximately 5991, with a fluctuation range of 5512-6470. Due to the dual impact of reduced enrollment plans and the continuous rise in medical application popularity, the admission ranking is expected to move slightly forward (increased competition) compared to 2025 (6337). Candidates need to plan their applications reasonably based on their own rankings.
